description: A White House propaganda poster celebrating Tax Day. The background is a full-color campaign-rally photograph of Donald Trump striding forward, smiling, with a raised clenched fist, wearing a navy suit, red tie, and a red 'USA' cap with a small American flag; behind him a blurred crowd of supporters and a large blue jumbotron screen reads 'DONALD J. TRUMP'. A bold red banner at the top holds large white serif text 'TAX DAY'. Near the bottom, three white check-mark bullet lines read: 'Largest Tax Refund Season', 'Refunds up 11%', and 'Millions Receiving More'. The White House wordmark and small Executive Mansion icon are centered at the very bottom. The technique pairs a triumphant, energetic leader image with positive economic bullet-point claims to credit Trump's 'Working Families Tax Cuts' with record refunds. Target audience is taxpayers and the general public, framing the administration's tax policy as a personal financial win.
notable_text: TAX DAY; Largest Tax Refund Season; Refunds up 11%; Millions Receiving More; THE WHITE HOUSE
